ioi_gennady_korotkevich: Gennady Korotkevich won gold at the International Olympiad in Informatics (IOI) in 2010, 2011, 2012, representing Belarus. IOI gold medalists are the top ~25 high-school competitive programmers worldwide each year. Many alumni go on to careers in software engineering at top technology companies, competitive-programming infrastructure, machine-learning research, or quantitative finance. Notable IOI gold medalists in this era include Gennady Korotkevich (Belarus), considered one of the strongest competitive programmers of his generation.

ioi_seyed_hamed_valizadehtoosi: Seyed Hamed Valizadehtoosi won gold at the International Olympiad in Informatics (IOI) in 2012, representing Iran. IOI gold medalists are the top ~25 high-school competitive programmers worldwide each year. Many alumni go on to careers in software engineering at top technology companies, competitive-programming infrastructure, machine-learning research, or quantitative finance. Notable IOI gold medalists in this era include Gennady Korotkevich (Belarus), considered one of the strongest competitive programmers of his generation.
